en.title: Kuala Lumpur's wildest open-air market
en.description: Sharks sold streetside, petai in the air — KL's open-air markets are loud, lively, and full of life. Sharks, petai, roselle, torch ginger and ingredients you've never seen, all in one place. Wander and stare at the rare finds, then grab fragrant char kuey teow at a nearby stall. 📍 Pudu Wet Market, 38 Jalan Pasar Baharu

ms.title: Pasar terbuka paling 'garang' di Kuala Lumpur
ms.description: Jerung dijual di tepi jalan, bau petai meruap — pasar terbuka KL memang meriah dan penuh kehidupan. Jerung, petai, roselle, halia torch dan pelbagai bahan yang jarang nampak, semuanya dalam satu pasar. Jalan sambil memerhati, kemudian cuba char kuey teow di gerai berhampiran. 📍 Pasar Basah Pudu, 38 Jalan Pasar Baharu
